prompt: /plan Fix the unsigned subtraction wrap in osal_mem_free when block size underflows — if the block header size exceeds the reported size the computed free size wraps to a huge number.

assertions.text: Response includes a preflight report section
assertions.description: /plan + bug fix involving arithmetic must trigger preflight

assertions.text: Preflight includes an arithmetic check flagging the unsigned wraparound risk
assertions.description: The whole point of the fix is a size_t/unsigned subtraction hazard — skill must surface it
